commit_scope: Expose the native mutation public gate through a header-gated production canary, keep ordinary no-header traffic on the existing API route, and repair the live attention metric route so the kernel front door proves end to end.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py ../deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py ../deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py
local_validation.summary: The deploy overlay now enables kernel-router only for explicit X-Form-Native-Preview: 1 and X-Form-Native-Public-Gate: 1 traffic on api.coherencycoin.com, with no host port and no ordinary no-header flip. Hostinger auto-deploy starts and locally probes the kernel canary before continuing, and CI/public deploy workflows run a public verifier that expects native decision receipts for the header treatment and non-native control for no-header traffic. Local kernel front-door preflight passed after the attention route was repaired to use structured alist router facts instead of a typed request route that cannot yet carry non-string live metrics. Wellness symbol resolution now recognizes shell function declarations so specs can truthfully claim deployed shell helpers.

known_limitations.observed: The public verifier is wired but not yet observed against a deployed commit in this branch. ci_validation and deploy_validation remain pending until PR checks and Hostinger deploy complete.
No ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE mutation traffic moves in this slice. No-header traffic remains on the existing FastAPI front-door route.

The typed route-data request surface currently carries string fields only, so live structured router metrics still use the compatibility alist route. This is an explicit native-form constraint for the next typed-request carrier move.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push and GitHub checks for codex/native-front-door-canary-20260609.

deploy_validation.notes: The verifier is added and will run in the public deploy workflow. It should pass only after the Hostinger deploy has layered the kernel-router canary overlay.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Explicit canary-header traffic can reach native mutation public-gate decision receipts through the kernel-router front door, while ordinary no-header public traffic remains outside the native canary.
test_flows: scripts/kernel_front_door_local_preflight.sh -> PASS fanout-exact version/health, PASS native-value coherence_weight, PASS native-attention with live metrics
python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py --json -> 5/5 cases passed, confidence 1.0, recommendation verify_deployed_header_canary, ordinary_traffic_flip_performed false
python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> 5/5 cases passed, confidence 1.0, ordinary_traffic_flip_performed false

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 30 passed
scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh is wired for deployed treatment/control proof and intentionally remains pending until this commit deploys

phase_gate.reason: Local kernel canary proof is complete, but the public canary must be deployed, verified, and observed over sustained X-Form-Native-Public-Gate traffic before any ordinary no-header flip.
